name: limit-guard
description: PostToolUse(Task) hook — detects a session/usage-limit signal in a subagent result and injects a non-blocking checkpoint directive: report progress (committed SHAs vs uncommitted), commit + push uncommitted work, write a `.claude/RESUME.md` resume manifest (done · remaining · reset time · next step), stop parallel fan-out and switch to sequential commit-per-unit work. Implemented in hexa-lang (`_limit_guard.hexa` via `hexa run` — no Python, no shell shim). Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_LIMIT_GUARD=1.
